content: Subscription will be automatically renewed <1>on {{finalDate}}</1> with updated pricing and specifications — <1>{{price}}/month ({{amount}})</1>

comment.text: This key displays a message confirming automatic subscription renewal with updated pricing and specifications. It appears within the renewal text on the Additional Storage Page in Portal Settings, informing the user about the new monthly price and storage amount. Translators should ensure accurate currency formatting and context for the gigabyte unit.

usage.context:
<Text className={styles.renewalText}>
 {isDowngrade ? (
 <Trans
 t={t}
 ns="Payments"
 i18nKey="SubscriptionAutoRenewedWithUpdate"
 values={{
 finalDate: storageExpiryDate,
 price: formatWalletCurrency!(monthlyPrice, 2),
 amount: `${currentStoragePlanSize} ${t("Common:Gigabyte")}`,
 }}
